service_description: Platform-hosted MasterNoder2 masternodes on shared infrastructure — one chain copy, 10,000 MN2 collateral per node, 50% of block rewards to the masternode tier.
public_notes: Pay $4.99 with PayPal — your slot is reserved instantly and the platform provisions your masternode automatically (10,000 MN2 collateral lock + broadcast).

shop_payments.comment: null = derive from USD + coins_per_mn2 + live MN2/USD; override with fixed coin price per slot

paypal_monthly.label: MN2 Masternode hosting — monthly
paypal_monthly.plan_note: Use PayPal subscription plan P-PLACEHOLDER-MN-HOST from monetization_config when live.
